title: centaurea leucophaea var. oscillans
intro: Centaurea leucophaea var. oscillans, also known as mountain centaury, is a type of flowering plant in the genus Centaurea, characterized by its tall stems and clusters of white flowers. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe and calm irritated skin and mucous membranes. The health benefits of mountain centaury include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and ease digestive problems. Mountain centaury can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for those looking to harness its natural healing properties.
